metadata.title: Vivu — Discover Gia Lai
metadata.description: Browse Gia Lai destinations, view images and ask Vivu AI for travel information.

footer.tagline: © {year} Vivu. Browse destinations, images and travel information for Gia Lai.

aiChat.title: Vivu AI Travel Assistant
aiChat.description: Ask questions and identify travel destinations with AI
aiChat.emptyTitle: What would you like to explore?
aiChat.emptyLead: Ask a question, upload an image, or combine both to learn about travel destinations.
aiChat.suggestion1: What is beautiful about Bien Ho, Gia Lai?
aiChat.suggestion2: What season is best for this destination?
aiChat.suggestion3: What can I do at this place?
aiChat.suggestion4: Suggest a one-day itinerary in Gia Lai
aiChat.placeContextLead: You are asking about {place}. Vivu AI will prioritize this destination.
aiChat.placeContextQuestion: Introduce {place} and suggest a suitable way to visit.
aiChat.placeholder: Ask Vivu AI about travel destinations…
aiChat.invalidType: Only JPEG, PNG, and WebP images are supported.
aiChat.error: Unable to send your question. Please try again.
aiChat.lowConfidence: This image looks like {place} at {score}, but Vivu AI is not fully certain yet.
aiChat.disclaimer: Answers are generated from Vivu retrieval data and may be incomplete.

home.heroLead: Browse destinations, view images and ask AI-powered travel questions about Gia Lai.
home.card1Body: Quickly find Gia Lai destinations synced from the Vivu database.
home.card2Body: View Gia Lai destinations with verified coordinates on the interactive map.
home.card3Body: Ask questions and identify Gia Lai destinations with Vivu's AI assistant.

explore.title: Explore
explore.lead: Browse Gia Lai destinations served directly from the Vivu database.
explore.headline: Discover Gia Lai
explore.emptyHint: Try removing some filters to broaden the results.
explore.errorTitle: Could not load destinations. Please try again.
explore.errorHint: Please retry in a moment or check your connection.
explore.mapEmpty: No places to show on the map. Try removing some filters.

place.mapCta: or open the full interactive map at
place.mapMissingGeo: The destination map is being updated.
place.askAi: Ask Vivu AI about this destination
place.idealTimeNote: Recommended by the Vivu editorial team.
place.ratingsEmpty: No reviews yet — be the first!
place.qaEmpty: No questions yet for this place.
place.loginToAct: Sign in to save, review or ask questions.
place.errorHint: It may have been removed or the URL is incorrect.

search.title: Search
search.headline: Find Gia Lai destinations
search.lead: Type a Gia Lai destination or theme to start exploring.
search.noResultsHint: Try a different keyword, or remove some filters to broaden results.
search.cardExploreBody: Scenic places, heritage sites, Cham towers and local experiences.
search.cardBeachBody: Coastal and island entries in the extended Gia Lai dataset.
search.cardCultureBody: Temples, heritage sites and local cultural spaces.

map.title: Gia Lai destination map
map.lead: Vivu displays Gia Lai destinations with verified coordinates on an interactive map.
map.updating: The destination map is being updated.
map.updatingLead: {total} Gia Lai destinations are available in the database. Remaining coordinates will be added gradually.
map.noGeoPlaces: No places with coordinates in this result set.
map.noFilteredPlaces: No places match the map filters.
map.layerHint: Tip: use the layer button (top right) to switch between Standard / Satellite / Terrain. Click a cluster to zoom into a group of places.

qa.title: Questions & Answers
qa.lead: Ask the community and get answers from people who have been there.
qa.empty: No questions yet — be the first!
qa.listLead: Ask questions about places you'd like to visit and get answers from those who've been there.
qa.emptyDescription: You can ask the very first question on any place's detail page.
qa.answerComposerHint: Sign in to answer this question.
qa.errorAnswerTooShort: Answer must be at least 5 characters.
qa.confirmDeleteQuestion: Delete this question (and all its answers)?
qa.notFoundDescription: The question may have been removed or the URL is incorrect.
qa.answersEmpty: No answers yet. Be the first to share your experience!
qa.answerComposerPlaceholder: Share your experience or knowledge (at least 5 characters)…

collections.title: My collections
collections.lead: Manage your collections of places by trip.
collections.empty: You have not created any collections yet.
collections.loginRequired: Sign in to view and create your own collections.
collections.addPlaces: Add places from Explore or place detail pages.
collections.listLead: Create collections by trip or theme and organize places your way.
collections.emptyDescription: Create your first collection to gather places by trip or theme.
collections.deleteCollectionConfirm: Delete this collection (with all its places)?
collections.publicToggleLabel: Allow others to view this collection
collections.addPlaceCta: Add places from Explore or place detail pages
collections.emptySoTayDescription: Open a place's detail page and tap 'Add to collection' to gather places here.

account.title: Your account
account.lead: Manage your profile, favorites and collections.
account.favoritesEmpty: You have no favorite places yet.
account.favoritesEmptyHint: Visit Explore and tap the heart on places you like.
account.introPlaceholder: You haven't added a bio yet — share a bit about your travel interests.
account.reviewsManageHint: Manage your reviews — feature coming soon.
account.reviewsEmptyHint2: Visit a place you love and leave your first review.
account.favoritesLead: Places you've hearted — visible only to you.
account.settingsLead: Update your personal info and security settings.
account.errorPasswordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters with letters and numbers.
account.profileBasicDesc: How you appear to the Vivu community.
account.fieldEmailHint: Email cannot be changed in this version.
account.fieldBioPlaceholder: A few lines about your travel interests, favorite regions…
account.errSessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
account.linkedDesc: Link external accounts for faster sign-in (coming soon).
account.passwordChangeDesc: After changing, other devices must sign in again.
account.fieldNewPasswordHint: At least 8 characters, with letters and numbers.
account.errPasswordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
account.errPasswordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
account.passwordChangedSuccess: Password changed. Other sessions have been revoked.
account.twoFactorDesc: Protect your account with OTP codes — coming soon.
account.twoFactorOffDesc: When on, you'll need an OTP each time you sign in on a new device.
account.twoFactorSoon: 2FA is coming soon — Google Authenticator + Authy supported.
account.linkedDesc: Link a third-party account for faster sign-in.
account.linkedSoon: Google OAuth integration is coming soon.
account.exportDesc: Download a copy of your data (GDPR compliant).
account.exportItemCollections: Collections & places saved in each collection
account.exportSoon: Coming soon — you'll receive a file via email after confirmation.
account.dangerDesc: Export a copy of your data or permanently delete your account. This cannot be undone.
account.exportMyDataDesc: Coming soon — sent via email as JSON.
account.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently deletes your account, reviews, collections, favorites.
account.deleteConfirmIntro: Enter your password to confirm account deletion.
account.notifDesc: Email and in-app notification preferences — coming soon.
account.privacyDesc: Control who can see your profile and activity — coming soon.
account.privacyPublicProfileDesc: Allow others to view your profile page.
account.privacyPublicCollectionsDesc: Public collections will appear on your profile.
account.privacyAllowTagDesc: Others can mention you in questions/reviews.

auth.loginLead: Sign in to save favorites, write reviews and manage collections.
auth.registerLead: Create a free account and start exploring Gia Lai with Vivu.
auth.forgotLead: Enter your email and we will send a reset link.
auth.resetLead: Create a new password for your account.
auth.googleSoon: Google sign-in is coming soon — please use email + password for now.
auth.agreeTerms: By creating an account you agree to Vivu's Terms and Privacy.
auth.successReset: Reset email sent — please check your inbox.
auth.successResetUpdated: Password updated. Sign in again to continue.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.registerTagline: Start your Gia Lai discovery journey
auth.passwordHint: At least 8 characters with both letters and numbers.
auth.errorAgreeRequired: Please agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy
auth.forgotSent: If {email} exists in our system, you'll receive a password reset link in a few minutes.
auth.forgotDevNote: Note: emails are not actually sent yet — the token is logged in the API console. Email delivery will turn on once SMTP/Resend is configured.
auth.resetLoginNew: ← Sign in with your new password
auth.termsCheckbox: I agree to the <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyHint: Vivu will notify you when there's activity related to your account.

errors.lead404: Looks like your trip took a wrong turn. The URL may have changed or the place was archived.
errors.lead500:
Our system hit a hiccup. Please try again in a moment.
If the problem continues, please contact us.
errors.onlineLead: Your internet connection is back. Let's keep exploring!
errors.offlineLead: We can't load data because your internet connection was interrupted. Please check Wi-Fi or mobile data and try again.
errors.maintenanceLead: Vivu is being upgraded to bring you a better experience. We'll be back as soon as possible — thank you for your patience.

admin.title: Overview
admin.lead: Quick view of place data, reviews, and recent activity.
admin.statActiveUsersHint: Will be tracked once accounts ship
admin.placesLead: Browse, edit and publish travel destinations.
admin.deleteConfirm: Delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.
admin.newPlaceLead: Saved as a draft by default. You can publish after reviewing the content.
admin.reviewsLead: Monitor user reviews. Hide inappropriate ones and restore as needed.
admin.reviewsEmptyHint: The table updates automatically when things change.
admin.guardForbiddenLead: Your account doesn't have permission to access the admin area. Contact a Vivu administrator for help.
admin.formSlugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. e.g. vinh-ha-long.
admin.formDescViPlaceholder: Write a detailed description: history, character, highlights...
admin.formMarkdownHint: Basic Markdown supported (bold, italic, lists, links).
admin.formHeroHint: Paste a Cloudinary or external URL.
admin.formRequiredError: Please fill in slug, title (Vietnamese), and choose a region.

review.writeLead: Share your real experience about this place. Your review will be visible publicly after submission.
review.contentPlaceholder: How did you feel about this place? What was memorable, what should others note...
review.ratingError: Please choose a rating from 1–5 stars.
review.contentError: Content must be at least 5 characters.

reviewsSection.title: Community reviews
reviewsSection.emptyLead: Be the first to share your real experience about this place.

qaSection.title: Q&A
qaSection.placeholder: What would you like to ask about this place? (5–1000 characters)
qaSection.tooShort: A question must be at least 5 characters.
qaSection.emptyLead: Wondering about something? Ask a question and let the community help.

favoriteBtn.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Sign in again to continue.

collectionBtn.signIn: Sign in to save to a collection
collectionBtn.newNamePlaceholder: e.g. Da Nang trip in July
collectionBtn.empty: You don't have any collections yet.
